Contact Us
Boltera · Our Company

A medical device company built around the surgeon's hand.

We're a Canada-based manufacturer of single-use medical devices — making instruments that earn their place in the operating room, one case at a time.

Our story

Engineering for the people who hold someone's life in their hands.

Boltera Inc. is dedicated to advancing healthcare through innovation, precision, and a steadfast commitment to quality. Founded by a team with over 32 years of expertise in the medical device industry, our company focuses on the design and manufacturing of high-tech disposable medical products. From stents and catheters to guide wires and balloons, we provide essential solutions that serve a wide range of medical specialties, including cardiology, radiology, neurology, anesthesiology, surgery, and urology.

Our goal is to empower healthcare professionals with reliable and innovative tools that improve patient outcomes and streamline medical procedures. With a planned portfolio of 40-45 state-of-the-art products, we aim to address the growing global demand for advanced medical devices while setting new standards in quality and performance.

At Boltera Inc., we take pride in contributing to the healthcare industry's progress while strengthening Canada’s position as a leader in medical technology. By combining decades of experience, cutting-edge technology, and a vision for the future, we strive to make a lasting impact on patient care and medical innovation worldwide.

Timeline

  • 2023
    Established company
    Boltera Medical is founded to design and manufacture single-use precision instruments for clinicians.
  • 2026
    Acquired a property in Guelph, Ontario
    Secured the company's permanent home at 11 Massey Rd, Guelph — the foundation for in-house production.
  • 2026
    Built a cleanroom
    Commissioned a dedicated cleanroom on the Guelph site, bringing precision assembly and sterilization in-house.
What we hold to

Three principles that decide every meeting.

/ 01

Clinical truth comes first.

Every device on our roadmap starts in an operating room — a real surgeon, real cases, real frustration. If we can't trace a feature back to that conversation, we don't build it.

/ 02

Tolerance is a moral choice.

A 0.05 mm deviation on a coronary shaft is the difference between a clean case and a complication. We don't compete on cost-cutting that touches the geometry of what enters a patient.

/ 03

Distribution is a relationship.

We pick fewer distributors than our competitors and stay close to the ones we have. Clinical training, on-site support, real responsiveness when a lot is questioned.

The facility

Guelph, Ontario — our home for precision manufacturing.

Our facility at 11 Massey Rd, Guelph integrates precision assembly, sterilization, and packaging under one roof — purpose-built for the single-use medical devices Boltera ships to clinicians.

Work with us

Distributor, hospital, or clinical partner — we'd like to talk.

Get in touch

Boltera Medical Devices — designing and manufacturing single-use precision instruments for clinicians worldwide.
